economic_notes: Band invested in 7% ownership of First Nations Fisheries Interest Group LP at cost of $18,796,992. Economic activities revenue of $19,103,282. Acquired fishing licenses for $1,800,000. Subsidiaries include Taqamkuk Development Corporation, Netukulimk Fisheries Ltd., Harbour Authority, and Exploits Motel.
notes: Consolidates Miawpukek Band, Taqamkuk Development Corporation, Netukulimk Fisheries Ltd., Harbour Authority, and Exploits Motel. Adjustment to opening surplus of $109,394 due to business acquisition. ISC receivable includes prior year amounts not received going back to 2018-2019. Fishing licenses of $12,037,825 carried as intangible non-financial assets. total_government_transfers set equal to total revenue minus economic activities (OSR); federal operating + federal capital + provincial = $32,964,416, so OSR = economic activities $19,103,282 + other revenue $8,550,723 = $27,654,005. Correcting: osr = other revenue + economic activities = 8550723 + 19103282 = 27654005; total_government_transfers = 28673020 + 2442869 + 1848527 = 32964416.
